questions.text: After school, Aarav starts using his tablet and time passes quickly. By evening, his homework is still untouched. What choice helps him manage both play and work?

options.text: Keep playing and finish homework later
Play freely and rush homework at night
Set a clear order: work first, then screen time

questions.text: During the weekend, Mehul spends most of the day on his tablet indoors. By night, his body feels restless. What supports both fun and movement?

options.text: Balance screen time with outdoor activity

questions.text: Nina enjoys watching videos and realizes she hasn't read anything in days. What helps her brain stay active in different ways?

options.text: Watch more to finish the series
Switch between videos, reading, and creative play

questions.text: While scrolling on a tablet, Karan forgets his daily chores. What strategy helps him stay responsible?

options.text: Try to do chores while watching
Finish chores before starting screen time

questions.text: Late-night gaming feels exciting, but mornings feel heavy at school. What choice helps keep energy steady?

options.text: Stop screen use earlier to protect sleep
Play longer and sleep when tired
Stay up and wake later if possible
